The image captures the essence of traditional cooking ingredients widely used in Indian cuisine and global kitchens.

cuisine/thai/stocks/thai-chicken-stock.m.title: Thai Chicken Stock
cuisine/thai/stocks/thai-chicken-stock.m.description: Photograph of the iconic Sriracha hot chili sauce bottles, featuring its distinctive green cap and red sauce. A popular condiment made with chili peppers, vinegar, garlic, sugar, and salt, Sriracha is widely used in Asian cuisine and fusion dishes worldwide. Perfect for adding spice and flavor to noodles, stir-fry, soups, pizza, and more.
